description: Possible topics include population modelling, neural networks, stochastic processes, discrete optimization, actuarial mathematics, calculus of variations, and fluid mechanics.
preAndCorequisites:
• Complete all of the following
    • Minimum third-year standing
    • additional prerequisites set by department depending upon topic.
repeatableCatalogText: May be taken more than once for credit in different topics with permission of the department.
supplementalNotes: • Credit will be granted for only one of MATH 492, MATH 491A (if taken in the same topic).
title: Topics in Applied Mathematics
